justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified that March 3rd had passed and then accurately processed the user's subsequent date and time requests, including expanding the search window.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots on the same day when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent handled multiple date and time requests within single turns, minimizing unnecessary back-and-forth.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment despite initial unavailability.
